article_items.title: Does Apple's New iOS 27 'Siri AI' Live Up to the Hype?
article_items.description: Apple completely rebuilt its assistant from scratch at WWDC 2026. We test the new iOS 27 'Siri AI' features, onscreen awareness, and more.
article_items.excerpt: Apple completely rebuilt its assistant from scratch at WWDC 2026. We test the new iOS 27 'Siri AI' features, onscreen awareness, and more.
article_items.summary: Photo Editing: A New Standard for Siri AI Photo editing has become a cornerstone of modern AI tools, and Siri AI’s latest updates indicate substantial progress in this domain. Apple has introduced advanced tools such as “Extend” , which allows for seamless background expansion, and “Reframe” , designed for intuitive cropping and perspective adjustments. This feature reflects Apple’s commitment to integrating AI with user data while adhering to its strict privacy standards. This makes Siri AI a more versatile and user-focused assistant for everyday tasks. Although still in its developmental stages, these updates signal a bright future for Apple’s AI technology and suggest that Siri AI is poised to play a more prominent role in the evolving AI ecosystem. Does Apple’s New iOS 27 ‘Siri AI’ Live Up to the Hype?
